mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS comment_id, -- 评论ID c.parent_id, -- 父评论ID（0=主评论，>0=回复，关联对应主评论comment_id） c.reply_to_id, -- 回复给哪个用户的ID（可选，用于显示"XX回复了XX"） c.content, -- 评论内容 c.images, -- 评论图片JSON数组 c.rating, -- 评分1-5 c.like_count, -- 评论点赞数 c.reply_count, -- 评论回复数 c.created_at , -- 评论时间 -- 评论发布者信息 u.id AS userId, u.username , u.avatar_url , -- 被回复者信息 ru.id AS replyToId, ru.username AS reply_to_user_name FROM comments c -- 左关联景点表：保证查询的是已上架的合法景点 LEFT JOIN scenics s ON c.target_id = s.id AND s.status = 1 -- 左关联评论发布者表 LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id -- 左关联被回复者表（可选，不需要回复人信息可删除此关联） LEFT JOIN users ru ON c.reply_to_id = ru.id WHERE c.target_type = 1 -- 固定为1，代表评论的是景点 AND c.status = 1 AND s.id = #{id} -- 传入【景点ID】 ORDER BY -- 按主评论分组：同一主评论的回复归为一组 IF(c.parent_id = 0, c.id, c.parent_id) DESC, c.parent_id ASC, -- 主评论（parent_id=0）永远在组内最前 c.created_at DESC; -- 组内按评论时间倒序（最新的评论/回复在前）

SELECT co.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE parent_id = co.id AND status = 1) AS reply_count FROM comments co WHERE co.target_id = #{targetId} AND co.target_type = #{targetType} AND co.parent_id = 0 AND co.status = 1 ORDER BY co.like_count DESC
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE parent_id = #{commentId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY like_count DESC
